speaker: speaker1
text: Room service , is there anything I can do for you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I am afraid there are not enough outlets .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , we have 6 for each room .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , but 4 of them are broken . Can you send someone here ?

speaker: speaker1
text: OK sir , please wait a minute .
